name: sod gate: abstain verdict blocks the commit only when changed files intersect critical-paths.txt (§2.5 sod_gate_on_critical_paths)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/verify && printf '{"pr_sha":"abc123","verdict":"abstain","reviewer":"verifier-bot"}' > .claude-tdd-pro/verify/abc123.json && printf 'src/auth/**\n' > critical-paths.txt && printf 'src/auth/login.ts\n' > changed-files.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/sod-gate.sh" --pr-sha abc123 --verifier-output "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/verify/abc123.json" --critical-paths "$PWD/critical-paths.txt" --changed-files "$PWD/changed-files.txt" --enforce
